name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, environment, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## Problem

<!--
Describe the problem you're trying to solve, not just the solution you have in mind.
What can't you currently do with verifiable-labs-envs that you wish you could?
If this is a new scientific environment proposal, describe the forward operator,
the inverse problem, and what makes the answer verifiable.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- The change you'd like to see. Be concrete: API shape, file paths, expected behavior. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you weighed and why they're worse. "None" is a valid answer if you genuinely haven't found any. -->

## Additional context

<!--
- Links to relevant prior art (papers, datasets, other RL benchmarks).
- Are you willing to send a PR? If so, do you need design feedback first?
- Estimated scope (single function vs. new env vs. new package).
-->
